style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, in two panels. LEFT panel labelled « AVANT : PRESTATION CENTRALE », with many arrows from edge boxes funnelling through one central box. RIGHT panel labelled « MAINTENANT : GOUVERNANCE CENTRALE », with a central box labelled « RÈGLES + VÉRIFICATION » connected by thin oversight lines to several edge boxes labelled « CONSTRUCTION ». Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
